subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: The first state of the perceiving soul is that in which it is engrossed in the gratification of desire. In this state its nature is like that of animals
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit, @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @universal peace; world unity
